rows.label: xs10090100_MSG0001
rows.name:
No way! How could we lose
to mere Earthlings[ST:wide ]—![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs10090100_MSG0003
rows.name: That was a terrifying enemy, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs10090100_MSG0004
rows.name:
But now the Growth must know how scary it
is to make enemies of Team Tatsu, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs10090100_MSG0005
rows.name:
Thanks to everyone, we managed
to destroy it, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs10090100_MSG0006
rows.name:
I'd like to think there are no more
mobile weapons in that class.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs10090100_MSG0007
rows.name:
If they attacked us in numbers with things like
these, our city would be gone in an instant...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs10090100_MSG0009
rows.name:
All the more reason we need to find
the Central Life as soon as possible.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs10090100_MSG0011
rows.name:
Remember what the Larsian named Ga
Derg told us in the White Woods...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs10090100_MSG0012
rows.name: The Growth fear Earthlings' original bodies.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs10090100_MSG0013
rows.name:
I don't know why, but if we
have any chance of victory...[ST:wait ]
